# SubMeshRef

One geometric part of a Model, referencing a mesh and its surface material.

## Parameters

- `mesh`: A string. A [Mesh](Mesh.md) or [ProceduralMesh](ProceduralMesh.md) asset. Optional.
- `material`: A string. A [Material](Material.md) asset.  `None` uses the default material.
